title: gonatocarpus micranthus
intro: Gonatocarpus micranthus, also known as small bog-rush or dwarf bog-rush, is a small, perennial plant species in the sedge family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gonatocarpus micranthus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some traditional practices, it is also used in poultices or salves to aid in wound healing.
